author: SantiMod
content:
The Galactic Marketplace, the Solana-powered core of Star Atlas, is now live!  → http://play.staratlas.com/market

 You can now buy and sell any metaverse asset including meta-posters & spaceships!

 Learn about our next-level integration with ProjectSerum:
http://medium.com/star-atlas/galactic-marketplace-solana-serum-powered-core-of-star-atlas-nft-trading-7a18d2d33371
